payload.goal: Review PRD updates for install wizard coverage and traceability.
payload.why: Ensure new install-wizard requirements/user stories are precise, testable, and correctly linked; ensure no internal inconsistencies in IDs/anchors/matrix.
inputs_already_verified: Decision: zsh PATH updates should go to ~/.zshrc.
Wizard includes PATH updating and shell rc detection.
changes: Check that REQ-F-012/013/014 are well-scoped, non-overlapping, and testable.
Check that FEAT-009 and US-012/US-013 acceptance criteria are precise enough to be used as implementation tests.
Check the traceability matrix links (anchors, ranges, and cross-references).
Call out any missing requirements needed for PATH update correctness (bash/fish rc selection rules, non-interactive semantics, idempotency markers).
done_when: Review result indicates approve or needs_changes with concrete actionable findings
Findings reference specific IDs/sections in docs/opencode-helper-cli.md
review_focus: Testability/precision of new install wizard requirements and user stories
Consistency with existing PRD scope and non-functional requirements
